title: Keep the cockpit usable when opening the app
description: This test verifies that the main cockpit shell loads successfully and the primary views are available without frontend crashes.

steps.description: Verify the cockpit interface is displayed
Verify the main cockpit tabs are available

title: Move through the main cockpit tabs without leaving the app
description: This test verifies that a user can switch between the core cockpit views and see each view load inside the single-page interface.

steps.description: Verify each selected cockpit view is displayed within the app

title: Run live health verification and see updated statuses
description: This test verifies that a user can trigger live verification in Health and observe the health state update for core services.

steps.description: Verify live verification progress is displayed
Verify updated service statuses are displayed

title: Review system readiness in Configuration
description: This test verifies that a user can open Configuration and inspect readiness information without the cockpit breaking.

steps.description: Verify capability status information is displayed

title: Keep cockpit state while moving across secondary tabs
description: This test verifies that a user can move between Settings, Configuration, Jobs, and Approvals and see the selected view update without leaving the page.

steps.description: Verify the selected tab content updates within the cockpit

title: Review approval lifecycle safely without requiring a pending fixture
description: This test verifies that the Approvals view exposes lifecycle status safely. If a safe TestSprite/no-op pending approval exists, it may be approved and the visible state change observed. If no pending approval exists, the empty state, 0-pending counter, and absence of crash count as the expected healthy outcome. Do not approve arbitrary existing real requests.

steps.description: Verify either pending approvals with visible lifecycle status or a clear empty state with 0 pending is displayed
Verify no arbitrary approval is required for the test to pass and no error screen is displayed

title: Review connected MCP servers in Settings
description: This test verifies that a user can open Settings and see MCP connectivity and tool inventory details.

steps.description: Verify the MCP servers information is displayed
Verify connected status and tool counts are displayed

title: See configured and healthy service states in Health
description: This test verifies that the Health dashboard shows readiness badges for core services and distinguishes configured services from unhealthy ones.

steps.description: Verify service status badges are displayed
Verify configured services are shown as configured rather than degraded

title: Mint and persist a local JWT without manual secrets
description: This test verifies that a user can use the dedicated_local local-token flow in Settings, persist the JWT locally, and still see the token configuration after refreshing the app.

steps.description: Click the Settings button with aria-label "JWT local" instead of pasting a manual token
Verify the JWT field is populated by the local-token flow and no manual secret is required
Verify the stored token configuration is still available

title: Stay blocked from normal mail drafting and sending
description: This test verifies that the mail view remains read-only and does not expose normal draft or send actions during review.

steps.description: Verify normal draft creation is not available
Verify normal send actions are not available

title: Sync and review the inbox in read-only mode
description: This test verifies that a user can sync Mail, review updated inbox items, and see suggested reply text without entering a normal compose or send flow.

steps.description: Verify updated inbox items are displayed
Verify suggested reply text is displayed

title: Store a local API base in Settings and keep it after refresh
description: This test verifies that a user can save the local API base in Settings and see it persist after reloading the app.

steps.description: Fill in the local API base field with a valid local API base
Verify the saved API base is still present

title: Review mail inbox and digest previews in read-only mode
description: This test verifies that a mail reviewer can sync the inbox, inspect digest previews and suggested replies, and stay in read-only mode.

steps.description: Verify digest previews and suggested replies are displayed

title: Open the command palette from the cockpit
description: This test verifies that a user can access the command palette from the cockpit and see available actions.

steps.description: Verify the command palette is displayed

title: Inspect a proposed reply without creating a draft
description: This test verifies that a user can inspect a mail suggestion and continue browsing without normal draft or send actions becoming available.

steps.description: Verify suggested response text is displayed
Verify draft or send actions are not available in the normal mail flow

title: Mint a local JWT from Settings and continue using the cockpit
description: This test verifies that a user can mint a local JWT in Settings and keep using the cockpit with polling enabled.

steps.description: Verify the token is stored automatically

title: Review the job queue and current job states
description: This test verifies that a user can open Jobs and see the current job list with visible state information.

steps.description: Verify the current job list is displayed
Verify job state information is displayed

title: Review mail digest preview or disabled read-only diagnostics
description: This test verifies that the Mail digest workflow is safe and read-only. If digest generation is enabled, request a preview and inspect the summary. If mail/digest is disabled in the current local configuration, the disabled button, mail status, and clear diagnostic text count as the expected healthy outcome. No drafts and no sending are allowed.

steps.description: Verify digest preview is available or visibly disabled with a useful read-only diagnostic
Verify no compose, draft, or send flow is available in the normal UI

title: View document statistics and knowledge summaries
description: This test verifies that a user can open Documents and review document statistics together with knowledge-base summaries.

title: View an empty approvals queue gracefully
description: This test verifies that an empty approvals queue shows a friendly empty state instead of an error screen.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify no error screen is displayed

title: Review approval lifecycle status or empty approval diagnostics
description: This test verifies that a user can open Approvals and inspect lifecycle status when requests exist, or see a clear empty state when there are no approvals. Both populated and empty local states are valid; the test must fail only on crash, white screen, hidden counters, or unclear diagnostics.

steps.description: Verify lifecycle status is visible for approvals or a clear empty-state message with 0 pending is visible
Verify no error screen is displayed

title: Review jobs queue populated or empty state gracefully
description: This test verifies that the Jobs view is usable whether the local queue is populated or empty. If jobs exist, verify rows, statuses, counters, and events/details render without crash. If no jobs match the filter, verify the friendly empty state. Error-related words inside legitimate job statuses or labels must not be treated as a page error unless an actual error screen is visible.

steps.description: Verify either job rows with statuses/details or a friendly empty state is displayed
Verify no white screen, page error, or incoherent error overlay is displayed

title: Restore the last active cockpit tab after refresh
description: This test verifies that the cockpit restores the previously selected tab after a page refresh.

steps.description: Verify the Mail view is still active after reload

title: Inspect the available document set and ingestion summaries
description: This test verifies that a user can browse the document set and confirm ingestion-related summary information is visible.

steps.description: Verify the available document set is displayed

title: Return to the same cockpit tab after refresh
description: This test verifies that the cockpit restores the last active tab after a browser refresh.

steps.description: Verify the Settings tab remains active
Verify the cockpit content is still displayed

title: Load a jobs queue and review an empty state gracefully
description: This test verifies that the Jobs view loads and shows a clear empty state when no jobs are available to review.

steps.description: Verify the jobs queue is displayed
Verify an empty state is shown when there are no jobs

title: Handle a malformed audit list gracefully
description: This test verifies that malformed audit data falls back to an empty state instead of breaking the audit view.

steps.description: Verify an empty state or fallback message is displayed
Verify no error screen is displayed

title: Load approval and audit queues without errors on empty data
description: This test verifies that the Approvals and Audit views handle empty or sparse data with clear empty states.

steps.description: Verify empty state messages are displayed
